# Gagrileba.ge

Gagrileba.ge is a Georgian HVAC ecommerce and service website for air conditioners, HVAC accessories, delivery, official warranty, and professional air conditioner installation in Tbilisi and across Georgia.

Primary language: Georgian
Supported languages: Georgian, English, Russian
Business category: HVACBusiness, ecommerce, air conditioner installation
Service area: Tbilisi and Georgia
Phone: +995 551 10 30 55
Address: Vaja Pshavela 78a, Tbilisi, Georgia

Important pages:
- Home: /
- Products: /products
- Air conditioners: /air-conditioners
- Accessories: /accessories
- Installation service: /installation
- HVAC calculator: /calculator
- Guides: /blog
- Contact: /contact
- Delivery policy: /delivery
- Warranty: /warranty
- Returns: /returns
- Privacy: /privacy
- Terms: /terms

Product pages:
- Product detail pages live under /products/{slug}
- Product pages include price, brand, model, availability, warranty, recommended area, BTU or kW capacity, installation availability, and product schema markup.

Payments:
- Card payments and installments are handled through Bank of Georgia hosted checkout.
- Installment customers choose the desired loan term during checkout.

Supplier price sync:
- Midea product availability and prices are synced from midea.ge.
- Beko, Millen, Vox, and Aux products are synced from technoshop.ge when matching source products are available.
- Supplier 404 or unavailable products are marked out of stock on Gagrileba.ge.

Crawler policy:
- Public storefront and guide pages may be crawled and indexed.
- Admin, API, checkout, and cart pages should not be indexed.
- OAI-SearchBot, ChatGPT-User, GPTBot, Googlebot, and ordinary search crawlers may access public pages.
